message:
refactor(test): remove dead NO_VERIFIED_INSTALLER code from new_tools.test

DSR now has a verified_installer in the manifest (added by another agent),
so the bespoke install-steps fallback branch was dead code. Simplified
the test to always check verified_installer for all 9 tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
